audit_name.description: A short identifier for this audit run. Only alphanumeric characters, underscores, hyphens, and dots are allowed. The provided value is sanitised and truncated to 50 characters before CWAC adds a timestamp prefix at runtime

headless.description: Whether to run the browser in headless mode (no visible window)

max_links_per_domain.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl per domain. Set to 1 to audit only the base URL

thread_count.description: Number of parallel browser threads to use. Set to 1 to disable multithreading (useful for profiling)

browser.description: The browser to use for auditing

chrome_binary_location.description: Path to the Chrome binary. Set to 'auto' to resolve automatically based on the OS and the chromeVersion in package.json

chrome_driver_location.description: Path to the ChromeDriver binary. Set to 'auto' to resolve automatically based on the OS

user_agent.description: The full User-Agent string sent with every request

user_agent_product_token.description: The product token portion of the User-Agent, used for robots.txt identification. Must not contain whitespace

follow_robots_txt.description: Whether to respect robots.txt directives when crawling

script_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for JavaScript execution in the browser

page_load_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for page load operations

delay_between_page_loads.description: Seconds to wait between loading consecutive pages. Use to reduce server load

delay_between_viewports.description: Seconds to wait after resizing the browser to a new viewport before running audits

delay_after_page_load.description: Seconds to wait after a page load completes before running audits

only_allow_https.description: When true, non-HTTPS URLs are skipped and not audited

perform_header_check.description: Whether to perform HTTP HEAD requests to pre-check URLs before auditing them

shuffle_base_urls.description: Whether to randomise the order in which base URLs are processed

base_urls_visit_path.description: Path to the directory containing CSV files of URLs to crawl and audit. Must be within the base_urls/ folder

base_urls_nohead_path.description: Path to the directory containing CSV files of URLs that do not support HTTP HEAD requests. Must be within the base_urls/ folder

record_unexpected_response_codes.description: Whether to log and record unexpected HTTP response codes encountered during crawling

force_open_details_elements.description: Whether to forcibly expand all <details> elements on a page before auditing, so their contents are included in the audit

filter_to_organisations.description: Restrict auditing to organisations whose name contains one of these strings. Leave empty to audit all organisations

filter_to_urls.description: Restrict auditing to URLs that contain one of these strings. Leave empty to audit all URLs

viewport_sizes.description: Named viewport sizes to test. Each audit is repeated at every listed viewport. At least one viewport is required

audit_plugins.description: Configuration for each audit plugin. Only the plugins defined here are permitted

axe_core_audit.description: Runs axe-core accessibility checks on each page

best-practice.description: Whether to include axe-core best-practice rules in addition to WCAG rules

language_audit.description: Checks that pages declare a valid language and optionally runs sentiment analysis

run_sentiment_analysis.description: Whether to run NLTK sentiment analysis on page text

reflow_audit.description: Checks whether page content reflows correctly at a narrow viewport (WCAG 1.4.10)

viewport_to_test.description: The viewport name (from viewport_sizes) at which reflow is tested

screenshot_failures.description: Whether to save a screenshot when a reflow failure is detected

title_audit.description: Checks that each page has a non-empty <title> element

focus_indicator_audit.description: Checks that interactive elements display a visible focus indicator when navigated to via the keyboard

root_element_css_selector.description: CSS selector for the root element within which tab-key navigation is tested

pre_tab_key_presses.description: Number of Tab key presses to perform before beginning the focus indicator check

max_tab_key_presses.description: Maximum number of Tab key presses to perform during the focus indicator check

screenshot_audit.description: Captures a full-page screenshot of each audited page

element_audit.description: Audits specific elements on a page matching a CSS selector

target_element_css_selector.description: CSS selector identifying the elements to audit
